scripts.build: tsc && rm -rf dist/assets && cp -r src/assets dist/assets
scripts.blob: npm-run-all build compile-scripts && rm -f payload.bin && node scripts/dist/generateBlob.js
scripts.publish:linux: npm-run-all build-sea:linux && mkdir -p publish && cp sea/build/out publish/installer
scripts.dev-pk: run-s build && pkexec --keep-cwd env DISPLAY=$DISPLAY WAYLAND_DISPLAY=$WAYLAND_DISPLAY XAUTHORITY=$XAUTHORITY XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR ./dist/qode ./dist/main.js
